2512 return HasSampler ? 4 : 5;
2513 return 0;
2514}
2515
2516unsigned getMaxNumUserSGPRs(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2517 if (isGFX1250(STI))
2518 return 32;
2519 return 16;
2520}
2521
2522bool isSI(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2523 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureSouthernIslands);
2524}
2525
2526bool isCI(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2527 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureSeaIslands);
2528}
2529
2530bool isVI(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2531 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureVolcanicIslands);
2532}
2533
2534bool isGFX9(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2535 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX9);
2536}
2537
2538bool isGFX9_GFX10(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2539 return isGFX9(STI) || isGFX10(STI);
2540}
2541
2542bool isGFX9_GFX10_GFX11(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2543 return isGFX9(STI) || isGFX10(STI) || isGFX11(STI);
2544}
2545
2546bool isGFX8_GFX9_GFX10(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2547 return isVI(STI) || isGFX9(STI) || isGFX10(STI);
2548}
2549
2550bool isGFX8Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2551 return isVI(STI) || isGFX9Plus(STI);
2552}
2553
2554bool isGFX9Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2555 return isGFX9(STI) || isGFX10Plus(STI);
2556}
2557
2558bool isNotGFX9Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) { return !isGFX9Plus(STI); }
2559
2560bool isGFX10(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2561 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX10);
2562}
2563
2564bool isGFX10_GFX11(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2565 return isGFX10(STI) || isGFX11(STI);
2566}
2567
2568bool isGFX10Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2569 return isGFX10(STI) || isGFX11Plus(STI);
2570}
2571
2572bool isGFX11(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2573 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX11);
2574}
2575
2576bool isGFX11Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2577 return isGFX11(STI) || isGFX12Plus(STI);
2578}
2579
2580bool isGFX12(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2581 return STI.getFeatureBits()[AMDGPU::FeatureGFX12];
2582}
2583
2584bool isGFX12Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) { return isGFX12(STI); }
2585
2586bool isNotGFX12Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) { return !isGFX12Plus(STI); }
2587
2588bool isGFX1250(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2589 return STI.getFeatureBits()[AMDGPU::FeatureGFX1250Insts];
2590}
2591
2592bool supportsWGP(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2593 if (isGFX1250(STI))
2594 return false;
2595 return isGFX10Plus(STI);
2596}
2597
2598bool isNotGFX11Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) { return !isGFX11Plus(STI); }
2599
2600bool isNotGFX10Plus(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2601 return isSI(STI) || isCI(STI) || isVI(STI) || isGFX9(STI);
2602}
2603
2604bool isGFX10Before1030(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2605 return isGFX10(STI) && !AMDGPU::isGFX10_BEncoding(STI);
2606}
2607
2608bool isGCN3Encoding(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2609 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGCN3Encoding);
2610}
2611
2612bool isGFX10_AEncoding(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2613 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX10_AEncoding);
2614}
2615
2616bool isGFX10_BEncoding(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2617 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX10_BEncoding);
2618}
2619
2620bool hasGFX10_3Insts(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2621 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX10_3Insts);
2622}
2623
2624bool isGFX10_3_GFX11(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2625 return isGFX10_BEncoding(STI) && !isGFX12Plus(STI);
2626}
2627
2628bool isGFX90A(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2629 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX90AInsts);
2630}
2631
2632bool isGFX940(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2633 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX940Insts);
2634}
2635
2636bool hasArchitectedFlatScratch(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2637 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureArchitectedFlatScratch);
2638}
2639
2640bool hasMAIInsts(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2641 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureMAIInsts);
2642}
2643
2644bool hasVOPD(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2645 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureVOPD);
2646}
2647
2648bool hasDPPSrc1SGPR(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2649 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureDPPSrc1SGPR);
2650}
2651
2652unsigned hasKernargPreload(const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2653 return STI.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureKernargPreload);
2654}
2655
2656int32_t getTotalNumVGPRs(bool has90AInsts, int32_t ArgNumAGPR,
2657 int32_t ArgNumVGPR) {
2658 if (has90AInsts && ArgNumAGPR)
2659 return alignTo(ArgNumVGPR, 4) + ArgNumAGPR;
2660 return std::max(ArgNumVGPR, ArgNumAGPR);
2661}
2662
2663bool isSGPR(MCRegister Reg, const MCRegisterInfo *TRI) {
2664 const MCRegisterClass SGPRClass = TRI->getRegClass(AMDGPU::SReg_32RegClassID);
2665 const MCRegister FirstSubReg = TRI->getSubReg(Reg, AMDGPU::sub0);
2666 return SGPRClass.contains(FirstSubReg != 0 ? FirstSubReg : Reg) ||
2667 Reg == AMDGPU::SCC;
2668}
2669
2670bool isHi16Reg(MCRegister Reg, const MCRegisterInfo &MRI) {
2671 return MRI.getEncodingValue(Reg) & AMDGPU::HWEncoding::IS_HI16;
2672}
2673
2674#define MAP_REG2REG \
2675 using namespace AMDGPU; \
2676 switch (Reg.id()) { \
2677 default: \
2678 return Reg; \
2679 CASE_CI_VI(FLAT_SCR) \
2680 CASE_CI_VI(FLAT_SCR_LO) \
2681 CASE_CI_VI(FLAT_SCR_HI) \
2682 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP0) \
2683 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP1) \
2684 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP2) \
2685 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP3) \
2686 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP4) \
2687 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP5) \
2688 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP6) \
2689 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP7) \
2690 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP8) \
2691 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP9) \
2692 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP10) \
2693 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP11) \
2694 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP12) \
2695 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP13) \
2696 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP14) \
2697 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP15) \
2698 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP0_TTMP1) \
2699 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP2_TTMP3) \
2700 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP4_TTMP5) \
2701 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP6_TTMP7) \
2702 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP8_TTMP9) \
2703 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP10_TTMP11) \
2704 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP12_TTMP13) \
2705 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP14_TTMP15) \
2706 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP0_TTMP1_TTMP2_TTMP3) \
2707 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP4_TTMP5_TTMP6_TTMP7) \
2708 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP8_TTMP9_TTMP10_TTMP11) \
2709 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP12_TTMP13_TTMP14_TTMP15) \
2710 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP0_TTMP1_TTMP2_TTMP3_TTMP4_TTMP5_TTMP6_TTMP7) \
2711 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP4_TTMP5_TTMP6_TTMP7_TTMP8_TTMP9_TTMP10_TTMP11) \
2712 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(TTMP8_TTMP9_TTMP10_TTMP11_TTMP12_TTMP13_TTMP14_TTMP15) \
2713 CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS( \
2714 TTMP0_TTMP1_TTMP2_TTMP3_TTMP4_TTMP5_TTMP6_TTMP7_TTMP8_TTMP9_TTMP10_TTMP11_TTMP12_TTMP13_TTMP14_TTMP15) \
2715 CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS(M0) \
2716 CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS(SGPR_NULL) \
2717 CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS_TO(SGPR_NULL64, SGPR_NULL) \
2718 }
2719
2720#define CASE_CI_VI(node) \
2721 assert(!isSI(STI)); \
2722 case node: \
2723 return isCI(STI) ? node##_ci : node##_vi;
2724
2725#define CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(node) \
2726 case node: \
2727 return isGFX9Plus(STI) ? node##_gfx9plus : node##_vi;
2728
2729#define CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS(node) \
2730 case node: \
2731 return isGFX11Plus(STI) ? node##_gfx11plus : node##_gfxpre11;
2732
2733#define CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS_TO(node, result) \
2734 case node: \
2735 return isGFX11Plus(STI) ? result##_gfx11plus : result##_gfxpre11;
2736
2737MCRegister getMCReg(MCRegister Reg, const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
2738 if (STI.getTargetTriple().getArch() == Triple::r600)
2739 return Reg;
2740 MAP_REG2REG
2741}
2742
2743#undef CASE_CI_VI
2744#undef CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS
2745#undef CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS
2746#undef CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS_TO
2747
2748#define CASE_CI_VI(node) \
2749 case node##_ci: \
2750 case node##_vi: \
2751 return node;
2752#define CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS(node) \
2753 case node##_vi: \
2754 case node##_gfx9plus: \
2755 return node;
2756#define CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS(node) \
2757 case node##_gfx11plus: \
2758 case node##_gfxpre11: \
2759 return node;
2760#define CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS_TO(node, result)
2761
2762MCRegister mc2PseudoReg(MCRegister Reg) { MAP_REG2REG }
2763
2764bool isInlineValue(MCRegister Reg) {
2765 switch (Reg.id()) {
2766 case AMDGPU::SRC_SHARED_BASE_LO:
2767 case AMDGPU::SRC_SHARED_BASE:
2768 case AMDGPU::SRC_SHARED_LIMIT_LO:
2769 case AMDGPU::SRC_SHARED_LIMIT:
2770 case AMDGPU::SRC_PRIVATE_BASE_LO:
2771 case AMDGPU::SRC_PRIVATE_BASE:
2772 case AMDGPU::SRC_PRIVATE_LIMIT_LO:
2773 case AMDGPU::SRC_PRIVATE_LIMIT:
2774 case AMDGPU::SRC_FLAT_SCRATCH_BASE_LO:
2775 case AMDGPU::SRC_FLAT_SCRATCH_BASE_HI:
2776 case AMDGPU::SRC_POPS_EXITING_WAVE_ID:
2777 return true;
2778 case AMDGPU::SRC_VCCZ:
2779 case AMDGPU::SRC_EXECZ:
2780 case AMDGPU::SRC_SCC:
2781 return true;
2782 case AMDGPU::SGPR_NULL:
2783 return true;
2784 default:
2785 return false;
2786 }
2787}
2788
2789#undef CASE_CI_VI
2790#undef CASE_VI_GFX9PLUS
2791#undef CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS
2792#undef CASE_GFXPRE11_GFX11PLUS_TO
2793#undef MAP_REG2REG
2794
2795bool isKImmOperand(const MCInstrDesc &Desc, unsigned OpNo) {
2796 assert(OpNo < Desc.NumOperands);
2797 unsigned OpType = Desc.operands()[OpNo].OperandType;
2798 return OpType >= AMDGPU::OPERAND_KIMM_FIRST &&
2799 OpType <= AMDGPU::OPERAND_KIMM_LAST;
2800}
2801
2802bool isSISrcFPOperand(const MCInstrDesc &Desc, unsigned OpNo) {
2803 assert(OpNo < Desc.NumOperands);
2804 unsigned OpType = Desc.operands()[OpNo].OperandType;
2805 switch (OpType) {
2806 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_FP32:
2807 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_FP64:
2808 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_FP16:
2809 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP16:
2810 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP16_SPLAT:
2811 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_NOINLINE_V2FP16:
2812 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_FP32:
2813 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_FP64:
2814 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_FP16:
2815 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_V2FP16:
2816 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_AC_FP32:
2817 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP32:
2818 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_AC_FP64:
2819 return true;
2820 default:
2821 return false;
2822 }
2823}
2824
2825bool isSISrcInlinableOperand(const MCInstrDesc &Desc, unsigned OpNo) {
2826 assert(OpNo < Desc.NumOperands);
2827 unsigned OpType = Desc.operands()[OpNo].OperandType;
2828 return (OpType >= AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_FIRST &&
2829 OpType <= AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_LAST) ||
2830 (OpType >= AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_AC_FIRST &&
2831 OpType <= AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_AC_LAST);
2832}
2833
2834// Avoid using MCRegisterClass::getSize, since that function will go away
2835// (move from MC* level to Target* level). Return size in bits.
2836unsigned getRegBitWidth(unsigned RCID) {
2837 switch (RCID) {
2838 case AMDGPU::VGPR_16RegClassID:
2839 case AMDGPU::VGPR_16_Lo128RegClassID:
2840 case AMDGPU::SGPR_LO16RegClassID:
2841 case AMDGPU::AGPR_LO16RegClassID:
2842 return 16;
2843 case AMDGPU::SGPR_32RegClassID:
2844 case AMDGPU::VGPR_32RegClassID:
2845 case AMDGPU::VGPR_32_Lo256RegClassID:
2846 case AMDGPU::VRegOrLds_32RegClassID:
2847 case AMDGPU::AGPR_32RegClassID:
2848 case AMDGPU::VS_32RegClassID:
2849 case AMDGPU::AV_32RegClassID:
2850 case AMDGPU::SReg_32RegClassID:
2851 case AMDGPU::SReg_32_XM0RegClassID:
2852 case AMDGPU::SRegOrLds_32RegClassID:
2853 return 32;
2854 case AMDGPU::SGPR_64RegClassID:
2855 case AMDGPU::VS_64RegClassID:
2856 case AMDGPU::SReg_64RegClassID:
2857 case AMDGPU::VReg_64RegClassID:
2858 case AMDGPU::AReg_64RegClassID:
2859 case AMDGPU::SReg_64_XEXECRegClassID:
2860 case AMDGPU::VReg_64_Align2RegClassID:
2861 case AMDGPU::AReg_64_Align2RegClassID:
2862 case AMDGPU::AV_64RegClassID:
2863 case AMDGPU::AV_64_Align2RegClassID:
2864 case AMDGPU::VReg_64_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2865 case AMDGPU::VS_64_Lo256RegClassID:
2866 return 64;
2867 case AMDGPU::SGPR_96RegClassID:
2868 case AMDGPU::SReg_96RegClassID:
2869 case AMDGPU::VReg_96RegClassID:
2870 case AMDGPU::AReg_96RegClassID:
2871 case AMDGPU::VReg_96_Align2RegClassID:
2872 case AMDGPU::AReg_96_Align2RegClassID:
2873 case AMDGPU::AV_96RegClassID:
2874 case AMDGPU::AV_96_Align2RegClassID:
2875 case AMDGPU::VReg_96_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2876 return 96;
2877 case AMDGPU::SGPR_128RegClassID:
2878 case AMDGPU::SReg_128RegClassID:
2879 case AMDGPU::VReg_128RegClassID:
2880 case AMDGPU::AReg_128RegClassID:
2881 case AMDGPU::VReg_128_Align2RegClassID:
2882 case AMDGPU::AReg_128_Align2RegClassID:
2883 case AMDGPU::AV_128RegClassID:
2884 case AMDGPU::AV_128_Align2RegClassID:
2885 case AMDGPU::SReg_128_XNULLRegClassID:
2886 case AMDGPU::VReg_128_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2887 return 128;
2888 case AMDGPU::SGPR_160RegClassID:
2889 case AMDGPU::SReg_160RegClassID:
2890 case AMDGPU::VReg_160RegClassID:
2891 case AMDGPU::AReg_160RegClassID:
2892 case AMDGPU::VReg_160_Align2RegClassID:
2893 case AMDGPU::AReg_160_Align2RegClassID:
2894 case AMDGPU::AV_160RegClassID:
2895 case AMDGPU::AV_160_Align2RegClassID:
2896 case AMDGPU::VReg_160_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2897 return 160;
2898 case AMDGPU::SGPR_192RegClassID:
2899 case AMDGPU::SReg_192RegClassID:
2900 case AMDGPU::VReg_192RegClassID:
2901 case AMDGPU::AReg_192RegClassID:
2902 case AMDGPU::VReg_192_Align2RegClassID:
2903 case AMDGPU::AReg_192_Align2RegClassID:
2904 case AMDGPU::AV_192RegClassID:
2905 case AMDGPU::AV_192_Align2RegClassID:
2906 case AMDGPU::VReg_192_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2907 return 192;
2908 case AMDGPU::SGPR_224RegClassID:
2909 case AMDGPU::SReg_224RegClassID:
2910 case AMDGPU::VReg_224RegClassID:
2911 case AMDGPU::AReg_224RegClassID:
2912 case AMDGPU::VReg_224_Align2RegClassID:
2913 case AMDGPU::AReg_224_Align2RegClassID:
2914 case AMDGPU::AV_224RegClassID:
2915 case AMDGPU::AV_224_Align2RegClassID:
2916 case AMDGPU::VReg_224_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2917 return 224;
2918 case AMDGPU::SGPR_256RegClassID:
2919 case AMDGPU::SReg_256RegClassID:
2920 case AMDGPU::VReg_256RegClassID:
2921 case AMDGPU::AReg_256RegClassID:
2922 case AMDGPU::VReg_256_Align2RegClassID:
2923 case AMDGPU::AReg_256_Align2RegClassID:
2924 case AMDGPU::AV_256RegClassID:
2925 case AMDGPU::AV_256_Align2RegClassID:
2926 case AMDGPU::SReg_256_XNULLRegClassID:
2927 case AMDGPU::VReg_256_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2928 return 256;
2929 case AMDGPU::SGPR_288RegClassID:
2930 case AMDGPU::SReg_288RegClassID:
2931 case AMDGPU::VReg_288RegClassID:
2932 case AMDGPU::AReg_288RegClassID:
2933 case AMDGPU::VReg_288_Align2RegClassID:
2934 case AMDGPU::AReg_288_Align2RegClassID:
2935 case AMDGPU::AV_288RegClassID:
2936 case AMDGPU::AV_288_Align2RegClassID:
2937 case AMDGPU::VReg_288_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2938 return 288;
2939 case AMDGPU::SGPR_320RegClassID:
2940 case AMDGPU::SReg_320RegClassID:
2941 case AMDGPU::VReg_320RegClassID:
2942 case AMDGPU::AReg_320RegClassID:
2943 case AMDGPU::VReg_320_Align2RegClassID:
2944 case AMDGPU::AReg_320_Align2RegClassID:
2945 case AMDGPU::AV_320RegClassID:
2946 case AMDGPU::AV_320_Align2RegClassID:
2947 case AMDGPU::VReg_320_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2948 return 320;
2949 case AMDGPU::SGPR_352RegClassID:
2950 case AMDGPU::SReg_352RegClassID:
2951 case AMDGPU::VReg_352RegClassID:
2952 case AMDGPU::AReg_352RegClassID:
2953 case AMDGPU::VReg_352_Align2RegClassID:
2954 case AMDGPU::AReg_352_Align2RegClassID:
2955 case AMDGPU::AV_352RegClassID:
2956 case AMDGPU::AV_352_Align2RegClassID:
2957 case AMDGPU::VReg_352_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2958 return 352;
2959 case AMDGPU::SGPR_384RegClassID:
2960 case AMDGPU::SReg_384RegClassID:
2961 case AMDGPU::VReg_384RegClassID:
2962 case AMDGPU::AReg_384RegClassID:
2963 case AMDGPU::VReg_384_Align2RegClassID:
2964 case AMDGPU::AReg_384_Align2RegClassID:
2965 case AMDGPU::AV_384RegClassID:
2966 case AMDGPU::AV_384_Align2RegClassID:
2967 case AMDGPU::VReg_384_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2968 return 384;
2969 case AMDGPU::SGPR_512RegClassID:
2970 case AMDGPU::SReg_512RegClassID:
2971 case AMDGPU::VReg_512RegClassID:
2972 case AMDGPU::AReg_512RegClassID:
2973 case AMDGPU::VReg_512_Align2RegClassID:
2974 case AMDGPU::AReg_512_Align2RegClassID:
2975 case AMDGPU::AV_512RegClassID:
2976 case AMDGPU::AV_512_Align2RegClassID:
2977 case AMDGPU::VReg_512_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2978 return 512;
2979 case AMDGPU::SGPR_1024RegClassID:
2980 case AMDGPU::SReg_1024RegClassID:
2981 case AMDGPU::VReg_1024RegClassID:
2982 case AMDGPU::AReg_1024RegClassID:
2983 case AMDGPU::VReg_1024_Align2RegClassID:
2984 case AMDGPU::AReg_1024_Align2RegClassID:
2985 case AMDGPU::AV_1024RegClassID:
2986 case AMDGPU::AV_1024_Align2RegClassID:
2987 case AMDGPU::VReg_1024_Lo256_Align2RegClassID:
2988 return 1024;
2989 default:
2990 llvm_unreachable("Unexpected register class");
2991 }
2992}
2993
2994unsigned getRegBitWidth(const MCRegisterClass &RC) {
2995 return getRegBitWidth(RC.getID());
2996}
2997
2998bool isInlinableLiteral64(int64_t Literal, bool HasInv2Pi) {
2999 if (isInlinableIntLiteral(Literal))
3000 return true;
3001
3002 uint64_t Val = static_cast<uint64_t>(Literal);
3003 return (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(0.0)) ||
3004 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(1.0)) ||
3005 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(-1.0)) ||
3006 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(0.5)) ||
3007 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(-0.5)) ||
3008 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(2.0)) ||
3009 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(-2.0)) ||
3010 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(4.0)) ||
3011 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint64_t>(-4.0)) ||
3012 (Val == 0x3fc45f306dc9c882 && HasInv2Pi);
3013}
3014
3015bool isInlinableLiteral32(int32_t Literal, bool HasInv2Pi) {
3016 if (isInlinableIntLiteral(Literal))
3017 return true;
3018
3019 // The actual type of the operand does not seem to matter as long
3020 // as the bits match one of the inline immediate values. For example:
3021 //
3022 // -nan has the hexadecimal encoding of 0xfffffffe which is -2 in decimal,
3023 // so it is a legal inline immediate.
3024 //
3025 // 1065353216 has the hexadecimal encoding 0x3f800000 which is 1.0f in
3026 // floating-point, so it is a legal inline immediate.
3027
3028 uint32_t Val = static_cast<uint32_t>(Literal);
3029 return (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(0.0f)) ||
3030 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(1.0f)) ||
3031 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(-1.0f)) ||
3032 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(0.5f)) ||
3033 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(-0.5f)) ||
3034 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(2.0f)) ||
3035 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(-2.0f)) ||
3036 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(4.0f)) ||
3037 (Val == llvm::bit_cast<uint32_t>(-4.0f)) ||
3038 (Val == 0x3e22f983 && HasInv2Pi);
3039}
3040
3041bool isInlinableLiteralBF16(int16_t Literal, bool HasInv2Pi) {
3042 if (!HasInv2Pi)
3043 return false;
3044 if (isInlinableIntLiteral(Literal))
3045 return true;
3046 uint16_t Val = static_cast<uint16_t>(Literal);
3047 return Val == 0x3F00 || // 0.5
3048 Val == 0xBF00 || // -0.5
3049 Val == 0x3F80 || // 1.0
3050 Val == 0xBF80 || // -1.0
3051 Val == 0x4000 || // 2.0
3052 Val == 0xC000 || // -2.0
3053 Val == 0x4080 || // 4.0
3054 Val == 0xC080 || // -4.0
3055 Val == 0x3E22; // 1.0 / (2.0 * pi)
3056}
3057
3058bool isInlinableLiteralI16(int32_t Literal, bool HasInv2Pi) {
3059 return isInlinableLiteral32(Literal, HasInv2Pi);
3060}
3061
3062bool isInlinableLiteralFP16(int16_t Literal, bool HasInv2Pi) {
3063 if (!HasInv2Pi)
3064 return false;
3065 if (isInlinableIntLiteral(Literal))
3066 return true;
3067 uint16_t Val = static_cast<uint16_t>(Literal);
3068 return Val == 0x3C00 || // 1.0
3069 Val == 0xBC00 || // -1.0
3070 Val == 0x3800 || // 0.5
3071 Val == 0xB800 || // -0.5
3072 Val == 0x4000 || // 2.0
3073 Val == 0xC000 || // -2.0
3074 Val == 0x4400 || // 4.0
3075 Val == 0xC400 || // -4.0
3076 Val == 0x3118; // 1/2pi
3077}
3078
3079std::optional<unsigned> getInlineEncodingV216(bool IsFloat, uint32_t Literal) {
3080 // Unfortunately, the Instruction Set Architecture Reference Guide is
3081 // misleading about how the inline operands work for (packed) 16-bit
3082 // instructions. In a nutshell, the actual HW behavior is:
3083 //
3084 // - integer encodings (-16 .. 64) are always produced as sign-extended
3085 // 32-bit values
3086 // - float encodings are produced as:
3087 // - for F16 instructions: corresponding half-precision float values in
3088 // the LSBs, 0 in the MSBs
3089 // - for UI16 instructions: corresponding single-precision float value
3090 int32_t Signed = static_cast<int32_t>(Literal);
3091 if (Signed >= 0 && Signed <= 64)
3092 return 128 + Signed;
3093
3094 if (Signed >= -16 && Signed <= -1)
3095 return 192 + std::abs(Signed);
3096
3097 if (IsFloat) {
3098 // clang-format off
3099 switch (Literal) {
3100 case 0x3800: return 240; // 0.5
3101 case 0xB800: return 241; // -0.5
3102 case 0x3C00: return 242; // 1.0
3103 case 0xBC00: return 243; // -1.0
3104 case 0x4000: return 244; // 2.0
3105 case 0xC000: return 245; // -2.0
3106 case 0x4400: return 246; // 4.0
3107 case 0xC400: return 247; // -4.0
3108 case 0x3118: return 248; // 1.0 / (2.0 * pi)
3109 default: break;
3110 }
3111 // clang-format on
3112 } else {
3113 // clang-format off
3114 switch (Literal) {
3115 case 0x3F000000: return 240; // 0.5
3116 case 0xBF000000: return 241; // -0.5
3117 case 0x3F800000: return 242; // 1.0
3118 case 0xBF800000: return 243; // -1.0
3119 case 0x40000000: return 244; // 2.0
3120 case 0xC0000000: return 245; // -2.0
3121 case 0x40800000: return 246; // 4.0
3122 case 0xC0800000: return 247; // -4.0
3123 case 0x3E22F983: return 248; // 1.0 / (2.0 * pi)
3124 default: break;
3125 }
3126 // clang-format on
3127 }
3128
3129 return {};
3130}
3131
3132// Encoding of the literal as an inline constant for a V_PK_*_IU16 instruction
3133// or nullopt.
3134std::optional<unsigned> getInlineEncodingV2I16(uint32_t Literal) {
3135 return getInlineEncodingV216(false, Literal);
3136}
3137
3138// Encoding of the literal as an inline constant for a V_PK_*_BF16 instruction
3139// or nullopt.
3140std::optional<unsigned> getInlineEncodingV2BF16(uint32_t Literal) {
3141 int32_t Signed = static_cast<int32_t>(Literal);
3142 if (Signed >= 0 && Signed <= 64)
3143 return 128 + Signed;
3144
3145 if (Signed >= -16 && Signed <= -1)
3146 return 192 + std::abs(Signed);
3147
3148 // clang-format off
3149 switch (Literal) {
3150 case 0x3F00: return 240; // 0.5
3151 case 0xBF00: return 241; // -0.5
3152 case 0x3F80: return 242; // 1.0
3153 case 0xBF80: return 243; // -1.0
3154 case 0x4000: return 244; // 2.0
3155 case 0xC000: return 245; // -2.0
3156 case 0x4080: return 246; // 4.0
3157 case 0xC080: return 247; // -4.0
3158 case 0x3E22: return 248; // 1.0 / (2.0 * pi)
3159 default: break;
3160 }
3161 // clang-format on
3162
3163 return std::nullopt;
3164}
3165
3166// Encoding of the literal as an inline constant for a V_PK_*_F16 instruction
3167// or nullopt.
3168std::optional<unsigned> getInlineEncodingV2F16(uint32_t Literal) {
3169 return getInlineEncodingV216(true, Literal);
3170}
3171
3172// Encoding of the literal as an inline constant for V_PK_FMAC_F16 instruction
3173// or nullopt. This accounts for different inline constant behavior:
3174// - Pre-GFX11: fp16 inline constants have the value in low 16 bits, 0 in high
3175// - GFX11+: fp16 inline constants are duplicated into both halves
3176std::optional<unsigned> getPKFMACF16InlineEncoding(uint32_t Literal,
3177 bool IsGFX11Plus) {
3178 // Pre-GFX11 behavior: f16 in low bits, 0 in high bits
3179 if (!IsGFX11Plus)
3180 return getInlineEncodingV216(/*IsFloat=*/true, Literal);
3181
3182 // GFX11+ behavior: f16 duplicated in both halves
3183 // First, check for sign-extended integer inline constants (-16 to 64)
3184 // These work the same across all generations
3185 int32_t Signed = static_cast<int32_t>(Literal);
3186 if (Signed >= 0 && Signed <= 64)
3187 return 128 + Signed;
3188
3189 if (Signed >= -16 && Signed <= -1)
3190 return 192 + std::abs(Signed);
3191
3192 // For float inline constants on GFX11+, both halves must be equal
3193 uint16_t Lo = static_cast<uint16_t>(Literal);
3194 uint16_t Hi = static_cast<uint16_t>(Literal >> 16);
3195 if (Lo != Hi)
3196 return std::nullopt;
3197 return getInlineEncodingV216(/*IsFloat=*/true, Lo);
3198}
3199
3200// Whether the given literal can be inlined for a V_PK_* instruction.
3201bool isInlinableLiteralV216(uint32_t Literal, uint8_t OpType) {
3202 switch (OpType) {
3203 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2INT16:
3204 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_V2INT16:
3205 return getInlineEncodingV216(false, Literal).has_value();
3206 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP16:
3207 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_V2FP16:
3208 return getInlineEncodingV216(true, Literal).has_value();
3209 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP16_SPLAT:
3210 llvm_unreachable("OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP16_SPLAT is not supported");
3211 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2BF16:
3212 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_V2BF16:
3213 return isInlinableLiteralV2BF16(Literal);
3214 case AMDGPU::OPERAND_REG_IMM_NOINLINE_V2FP16:
3215 return false;
3216 default:
3217 llvm_unreachable("bad packed operand type");
3218 }
3219}
3220
3221// Whether the given literal can be inlined for a V_PK_*_IU16 instruction.
3222bool isInlinableLiteralV2I16(uint32_t Literal) {
3223 return getInlineEncodingV2I16(Literal).has_value();
3224}
3225
3226// Whether the given literal can be inlined for a V_PK_*_BF16 instruction.
3227bool isInlinableLiteralV2BF16(uint32_t Literal) {
3228 return getInlineEncodingV2BF16(Literal).has_value();
3229}
3230
3231// Whether the given literal can be inlined for a V_PK_*_F16 instruction.
3232bool isInlinableLiteralV2F16(uint32_t Literal) {
3233 return getInlineEncodingV2F16(Literal).has_value();
3234}
3235
3236// Whether the given literal can be inlined for V_PK_FMAC_F16 instruction.
3237bool isPKFMACF16InlineConstant(uint32_t Literal, bool IsGFX11Plus) {
3238 return getPKFMACF16InlineEncoding(Literal, IsGFX11Plus).has_value();
3239}
3240
3241bool isValid32BitLiteral(uint64_t Val, bool IsFP64) {
3242 if (IsFP64)
3243 return !Lo_32(Val);
3244
3245 return isUInt<32>(Val) || isInt<32>(Val);
3246}
3247
3248int64_t encode32BitLiteral(int64_t Imm, OperandType Type, bool IsLit) {
3249 switch (Type) {
3250 default:
3251 break;
3252 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_BF16:
3253 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_FP16:
3254 case OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_BF16:
3255 case OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_FP16:
3256 return Imm & 0xffff;
3257 case OPERAND_INLINE_SPLIT_BARRIER_INT32:
3258 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_FP32:
3259 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_INT32:
3260 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2BF16:
3261 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP16:
3262 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP16_SPLAT:
3263 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2FP32:
3264 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2INT16:
3265 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_V2INT32:
3266 case OPERAND_REG_INLINE_AC_FP32:
3267 case OPERAND_REG_INLINE_AC_INT32:
3268 case OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_FP32:
3269 case OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C_INT32:
3270 return Lo_32(Imm);
3271 case OPERAND_REG_IMM_FP64:
3272 return IsLit ? Imm : Hi_32(Imm);
3273 }
3274 return Imm;
3275}
3276
3277bool isArgPassedInSGPR(const Argument *A) {
3278 const Function *F = A->getParent();
3279
3280 // Arguments to compute shaders are never a source of divergence.
3281 CallingConv::ID CC = F->getCallingConv();
3282 switch (CC) {
3283 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_KERNEL:
3284 case CallingConv::SPIR_KERNEL:
3285 return true;
3286 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_VS:
3287 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_LS:
3288 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_HS:
3289 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_ES:
3290 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_GS:
3291 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_PS:
3292 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_CS:
3293 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_Gfx:
3294 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_CS_Chain:
3295 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_CS_ChainPreserve:
3296 // For non-compute shaders, SGPR inputs are marked with either inreg or
3297 // byval. Everything else is in VGPRs.
3298 return A->hasAttribute(Attribute::InReg) ||
3299 A->hasAttribute(Attribute::ByVal);
3300 default:
3301 // TODO: treat i1 as divergent?
3302 return A->hasAttribute(Attribute::InReg);
3303 }
3304}
3305
3306bool isArgPassedInSGPR(const CallBase *CB, unsigned ArgNo) {
3307 // Arguments to compute shaders are never a source of divergence.
3308 CallingConv::ID CC = CB->getCallingConv();
3309 switch (CC) {
3310 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_KERNEL:
3311 case CallingConv::SPIR_KERNEL:
3312 return true;
3313 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_VS:
3314 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_LS:
3315 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_HS:
3316 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_ES:
3317 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_GS:
3318 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_PS:
3319 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_CS:
3320 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_Gfx:
3321 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_CS_Chain:
3322 case CallingConv::AMDGPU_CS_ChainPreserve:
3323 // For non-compute shaders, SGPR inputs are marked with either inreg or
3324 // byval. Everything else is in VGPRs.
3325 return CB->paramHasAttr(ArgNo, Attribute::InReg) ||
3326 CB->paramHasAttr(ArgNo, Attribute::ByVal);
3327 default:
3328 return CB->paramHasAttr(ArgNo, Attribute::InReg);
3329 }
3330}
3331
3332static bool hasSMEMByteOffset(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST) {
3333 return isGCN3Encoding(ST) || isGFX10Plus(ST);
3334}
3335
3336bool isLegalSMRDEncodedUnsignedOffset(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST,
3337 int64_t EncodedOffset) {
3338 if (isGFX12Plus(ST))
3339 return isUInt<23>(EncodedOffset);
3340
3341 return hasSMEMByteOffset(ST) ? isUInt<20>(EncodedOffset)
3342 : isUInt<8>(EncodedOffset);
3343}
3344
3345bool isLegalSMRDEncodedSignedOffset(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST,
3346 int64_t EncodedOffset, bool IsBuffer) {
3347 if (isGFX12Plus(ST)) {
3348 if (IsBuffer && EncodedOffset < 0)
3349 return false;
3350 return isInt<24>(EncodedOffset);
3351 }
3352
3353 return !IsBuffer && hasSMRDSignedImmOffset(ST) && isInt<21>(EncodedOffset);
3354}
3355
3356static bool isDwordAligned(uint64_t ByteOffset) {
3357 return (ByteOffset & 3) == 0;
3358}
3359
3360uint64_t convertSMRDOffsetUnits(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST,
3361 uint64_t ByteOffset) {
3362 if (hasSMEMByteOffset(ST))
3363 return ByteOffset;
3364
3365 assert(isDwordAligned(ByteOffset));
3366 return ByteOffset >> 2;
3367}
3368
3369std::optional<int64_t> getSMRDEncodedOffset(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST,
3370 int64_t ByteOffset, bool IsBuffer,
3371 bool HasSOffset) {
3372 // For unbuffered smem loads, it is illegal for the Immediate Offset to be
3373 // negative if the resulting (Offset + (M0 or SOffset or zero) is negative.
3374 // Handle case where SOffset is not present.
3375 if (!IsBuffer && !HasSOffset && ByteOffset < 0 && hasSMRDSignedImmOffset(ST))
3376 return std::nullopt;
3377
3378 if (isGFX12Plus(ST)) // 24 bit signed offsets
3379 return isInt<24>(ByteOffset) ? std::optional<int64_t>(ByteOffset)
3380 : std::nullopt;
3381
3382 // The signed version is always a byte offset.
3383 if (!IsBuffer && hasSMRDSignedImmOffset(ST)) {
3384 assert(hasSMEMByteOffset(ST));
3385 return isInt<20>(ByteOffset) ? std::optional<int64_t>(ByteOffset)
3386 : std::nullopt;
3387 }
3388
3389 if (!isDwordAligned(ByteOffset) && !hasSMEMByteOffset(ST))
3390 return std::nullopt;
3391
3392 int64_t EncodedOffset = convertSMRDOffsetUnits(ST, ByteOffset);
3393 return isLegalSMRDEncodedUnsignedOffset(ST, EncodedOffset)
3394 ? std::optional<int64_t>(EncodedOffset)
3395 : std::nullopt;
3396}
3397
3398std::optional<int64_t> getSMRDEncodedLiteralOffset32(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST,
3399 int64_t ByteOffset) {
3400 if (!isCI(ST) || !isDwordAligned(ByteOffset))
3401 return std::nullopt;
3402
3403 int64_t EncodedOffset = convertSMRDOffsetUnits(ST, ByteOffset);
3404 return isUInt<32>(EncodedOffset) ? std::optional<int64_t>(EncodedOffset)
3405 : std::nullopt;
3406}
3407
3408unsigned getNumFlatOffsetBits(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST) {
3409 if (AMDGPU::isGFX10(ST))
3410 return 12;
3411
3412 if (AMDGPU::isGFX12(ST))
3413 return 24;
3414 return 13;
3415}
3416
3417namespace {
3418
3419struct SourceOfDivergence {
3420 unsigned Intr;
3421};
3422const SourceOfDivergence *lookupSourceOfDivergence(unsigned Intr);
3423
3424struct AlwaysUniform {
3425 unsigned Intr;
3426};
3427const AlwaysUniform *lookupAlwaysUniform(unsigned Intr);
3428
3429#define GET_SourcesOfDivergence_IMPL
3430#define GET_UniformIntrinsics_IMPL
3431#define GET_Gfx9BufferFormat_IMPL
3432#define GET_Gfx10BufferFormat_IMPL
3433#define GET_Gfx11PlusBufferFormat_IMPL
3434
3435#include "AMDGPUGenSearchableTables.inc"
3436
3437} // end anonymous namespace
3438
3439bool isIntrinsicSourceOfDivergence(unsigned IntrID) {
3440 return lookupSourceOfDivergence(IntrID);
3441}
3442
3443bool isIntrinsicAlwaysUniform(unsigned IntrID) {
3444 return lookupAlwaysUniform(IntrID);
3445}
3446
3447const GcnBufferFormatInfo *getGcnBufferFormatInfo(uint8_t BitsPerComp,
3448 uint8_t NumComponents,
3449 uint8_t NumFormat,
3450 const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
3451 return isGFX11Plus(STI) ? getGfx11PlusBufferFormatInfo(
3452 BitsPerComp, NumComponents, NumFormat)
3453 : isGFX10(STI)
3454 ? getGfx10BufferFormatInfo(BitsPerComp, NumComponents, NumFormat)
3455 : getGfx9BufferFormatInfo(BitsPerComp, NumComponents, NumFormat);
3456}
3457
3458const GcnBufferFormatInfo *getGcnBufferFormatInfo(uint8_t Format,
3459 const MCSubtargetInfo &STI) {
3460 return isGFX11Plus(STI) ? getGfx11PlusBufferFormatInfo(Format)
3461 : isGFX10(STI) ? getGfx10BufferFormatInfo(Format)
3462 : getGfx9BufferFormatInfo(Format);
3463}
3464
3465const MCRegisterClass *getVGPRPhysRegClass(MCRegister Reg,
3466 const MCRegisterInfo &MRI) {
3467 const unsigned VGPRClasses[] = {
3468 AMDGPU::VGPR_16RegClassID, AMDGPU::VGPR_32RegClassID,
3469 AMDGPU::VReg_64RegClassID, AMDGPU::VReg_96RegClassID,
3470 AMDGPU::VReg_128RegClassID, AMDGPU::VReg_160RegClassID,
3471 AMDGPU::VReg_192RegClassID, AMDGPU::VReg_224RegClassID,
3472 AMDGPU::VReg_256RegClassID, AMDGPU::VReg_288RegClassID,
3473 AMDGPU::VReg_320RegClassID, AMDGPU::VReg_352RegClassID,
3474 AMDGPU::VReg_384RegClassID, AMDGPU::VReg_512RegClassID,
3475 AMDGPU::VReg_1024RegClassID};
3476
3477 for (unsigned RCID : VGPRClasses) {
3478 const MCRegisterClass &RC = MRI.getRegClass(RCID);
3479 if (RC.contains(Reg))
3480 return &RC;
3481 }
3482
3483 return nullptr;
3484}
3485
3486unsigned getVGPREncodingMSBs(MCRegister Reg, const MCRegisterInfo &MRI) {
3487 unsigned Enc = MRI.getEncodingValue(Reg);
3488 unsigned Idx = Enc & AMDGPU::HWEncoding::REG_IDX_MASK;
3489 return Idx >> 8;
3490}
3491
3492MCRegister getVGPRWithMSBs(MCRegister Reg, unsigned MSBs,
3493 const MCRegisterInfo &MRI) {
3494 unsigned Enc = MRI.getEncodingValue(Reg);
3495 unsigned Idx = Enc & AMDGPU::HWEncoding::REG_IDX_MASK;
3496 if (Idx >= 0x100)
3497 return MCRegister();
3498
3499 const MCRegisterClass *RC = getVGPRPhysRegClass(Reg, MRI);
3500 if (!RC)
3501 return MCRegister();
3502
3503 Idx |= MSBs << 8;
3504 if (RC->getID() == AMDGPU::VGPR_16RegClassID) {
3505 // This class has 2048 registers with interleaved lo16 and hi16.
3506 Idx *= 2;
3507 if (Enc & AMDGPU::HWEncoding::IS_HI16)
3508 ++Idx;
3509 }
3510
3511 return RC->getRegister(Idx);
3512}
3513
3514std::pair<const AMDGPU::OpName *, const AMDGPU::OpName *>
3515getVGPRLoweringOperandTables(const MCInstrDesc &Desc) {
3516 static const AMDGPU::OpName VOPOps[4] = {
3517 AMDGPU::OpName::src0, AMDGPU::OpName::src1, AMDGPU::OpName::src2,
3518 AMDGPU::OpName::vdst};
3519 static const AMDGPU::OpName VDSOps[4] = {
3520 AMDGPU::OpName::addr, AMDGPU::OpName::data0, AMDGPU::OpName::data1,
3521 AMDGPU::OpName::vdst};
3522 static const AMDGPU::OpName FLATOps[4] = {
3523 AMDGPU::OpName::vaddr, AMDGPU::OpName::vdata,
3524 AMDGPU::OpName::NUM_OPERAND_NAMES, AMDGPU::OpName::vdst};
3525 static const AMDGPU::OpName BUFOps[4] = {
3526 AMDGPU::OpName::vaddr, AMDGPU::OpName::NUM_OPERAND_NAMES,
3527 AMDGPU::OpName::NUM_OPERAND_NAMES, AMDGPU::OpName::vdata};
3528 static const AMDGPU::OpName VIMGOps[4] = {
3529 AMDGPU::OpName::vaddr0, AMDGPU::OpName::vaddr1, AMDGPU::OpName::vaddr2,
3530 AMDGPU::OpName::vdata};
3531
3532 // For VOPD instructions MSB of a corresponding Y component operand VGPR
3533 // address is supposed to match X operand, otherwise VOPD shall not be
3534 // combined.
3535 static const AMDGPU::OpName VOPDOpsX[4] = {
3536 AMDGPU::OpName::src0X, AMDGPU::OpName::vsrc1X, AMDGPU::OpName::vsrc2X,
3537 AMDGPU::OpName::vdstX};
3538 static const AMDGPU::OpName VOPDOpsY[4] = {
3539 AMDGPU::OpName::src0Y, AMDGPU::OpName::vsrc1Y, AMDGPU::OpName::vsrc2Y,
3540 AMDGPU::OpName::vdstY};
3541
3542 // VOP2 MADMK instructions use src0, imm, src1 scheme.
3543 static const AMDGPU::OpName VOP2MADMKOps[4] = {
3544 AMDGPU::OpName::src0, AMDGPU::OpName::NUM_OPERAND_NAMES,
3545 AMDGPU::OpName::src1, AMDGPU::OpName::vdst};
3546 static const AMDGPU::OpName VOPDFMAMKOpsX[4] = {
3547 AMDGPU::OpName::src0X, AMDGPU::OpName::NUM_OPERAND_NAMES,
3548 AMDGPU::OpName::vsrc1X, AMDGPU::OpName::vdstX};
3549 static const AMDGPU::OpName VOPDFMAMKOpsY[4] = {
3550 AMDGPU::OpName::src0Y, AMDGPU::OpName::NUM_OPERAND_NAMES,
3551 AMDGPU::OpName::vsrc1Y, AMDGPU::OpName::vdstY};
3552
3553 unsigned TSFlags = Desc.TSFlags;
3554
3555 if (TSFlags &
3556 (SIInstrFlags::VOP1 | SIInstrFlags::VOP2 | SIInstrFlags::VOP3 |
3557 SIInstrFlags::VOP3P | SIInstrFlags::VOPC | SIInstrFlags::DPP)) {
3558 switch (Desc.getOpcode()) {
3559 // LD_SCALE operands ignore MSB.
3560 case AMDGPU::V_WMMA_LD_SCALE_PAIRED_B32:
3561 case AMDGPU::V_WMMA_LD_SCALE_PAIRED_B32_gfx1250:
3562 case AMDGPU::V_WMMA_LD_SCALE16_PAIRED_B64:
3563 case AMDGPU::V_WMMA_LD_SCALE16_PAIRED_B64_gfx1250:
3564 return {};
3565 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F16:
3566 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F16_t16:
3567 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F16_t16_gfx12:
3568 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F16_fake16:
3569 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F16_fake16_gfx12:
3570 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F32:
3571 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F32_gfx12:
3572 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F64:
3573 case AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F64_gfx1250:
3574 return {VOP2MADMKOps, nullptr};
3575 default:
3576 break;
3577 }
3578 return {VOPOps, nullptr};
3579 }
3580
3581 if (TSFlags & SIInstrFlags::DS)
3582 return {VDSOps, nullptr};
3583
3584 if (TSFlags & SIInstrFlags::FLAT)
3585 return {FLATOps, nullptr};
3586
3587 if (TSFlags & (SIInstrFlags::MUBUF | SIInstrFlags::MTBUF))
3588 return {BUFOps, nullptr};
3589
3590 if (TSFlags & SIInstrFlags::VIMAGE)
3591 return {VIMGOps, nullptr};
3592
3593 if (AMDGPU::isVOPD(Desc.getOpcode())) {
3594 auto [OpX, OpY] = getVOPDComponents(Desc.getOpcode());
3595 return {(OpX == AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F32) ? VOPDFMAMKOpsX : VOPDOpsX,
3596 (OpY == AMDGPU::V_FMAMK_F32) ? VOPDFMAMKOpsY : VOPDOpsY};
3597 }
3598
3599 assert(!(TSFlags & SIInstrFlags::MIMG));
3600
3601 if (TSFlags & (SIInstrFlags::VSAMPLE | SIInstrFlags::EXP))
3602 llvm_unreachable("Sample and export VGPR lowering is not implemented and"
3603 " these instructions are not expected on gfx1250");
3604
3605 return {};
3606}
3607
3608bool supportsScaleOffset(const MCInstrInfo &MII, unsigned Opcode) {
3609 uint64_t TSFlags = MII.get(Opcode).TSFlags;
3610
3611 if (TSFlags & SIInstrFlags::SMRD)
3612 return !getSMEMIsBuffer(Opcode);
3613 if (!(TSFlags & SIInstrFlags::FLAT))
3614 return false;
3615
3616 // Only SV and SVS modes are supported.
3617 if (TSFlags & SIInstrFlags::FlatScratch)
3618 return hasNamedOperand(Opcode, OpName::vaddr);
3619
3620 // Only GVS mode is supported.
3621 return hasNamedOperand(Opcode, OpName::vaddr) &&
3622 hasNamedOperand(Opcode, OpName::saddr);
3623
3624 return false;
3625}
3626
3627bool hasAny64BitVGPROperands(const MCInstrDesc &OpDesc, const MCInstrInfo &MII,
3628 const MCSubtargetInfo &ST) {
3629 for (auto OpName : {OpName::vdst, OpName::src0, OpName::src1, OpName::src2}) {
3630 int Idx = getNamedOperandIdx(OpDesc.getOpcode(), OpName);
3631 if (Idx == -1)
3632 continue;
3633
3634 const MCOperandInfo &OpInfo = OpDesc.operands()[Idx];
3635 int16_t RegClass = MII.getOpRegClassID(
3636 OpInfo, ST.getHwMode(MCSubtargetInfo::HwMode_RegInfo));
3637 if (RegClass == AMDGPU::VReg_64RegClassID ||
3638 RegClass == AMDGPU::VReg_64_Align2RegClassID)
3639 return true;
3640 }
3641
3642 return false;
3643}
3644
3645bool isDPALU_DPP32BitOpc(unsigned Opc) {
3646 switch (Opc) {
3647 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_LO_U32_e64:
3648 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_LO_U32_e64_dpp:
3649 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_LO_U32_e64_dpp_gfx1250:
3650 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_HI_U32_e64:
3651 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_HI_U32_e64_dpp:
3652 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_HI_U32_e64_dpp_gfx1250:
3653 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_HI_I32_e64:
3654 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_HI_I32_e64_dpp:
3655 case AMDGPU::V_MUL_HI_I32_e64_dpp_gfx1250:
3656 case AMDGPU::V_MAD_U32_e64:
3657 case AMDGPU::V_MAD_U32_e64_dpp:
3658 case AMDGPU::V_MAD_U32_e64_dpp_gfx1250:
3659 return true;
3660 default:
3661 return false;
3662 }
3663}
3664
3665bool isDPALU_DPP(const MCInstrDesc &OpDesc, const MCInstrInfo &MII,
3666 const MCSubtargetInfo &ST) {
3667 if (!ST.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureDPALU_DPP))
3668 return false;
3669
3670 if (isDPALU_DPP32BitOpc(OpDesc.getOpcode()))
3671 return ST.hasFeature(AMDGPU::FeatureGFX1250Insts);
3672
3673 return hasAny64BitVGPROperands(OpDesc, MII, ST);
3674}
3675
3676unsigned getLdsDwGranularity(const MCSubtargetInfo &ST) {
3677 if (ST.getFeatureBits().test(FeatureAddressableLocalMemorySize32768))
3678 return 64;
3679 if (ST.getFeatureBits().test(FeatureAddressableLocalMemorySize65536))
3680 return 128;
3681 if (ST.getFeatureBits().test(FeatureAddressableLocalMemorySize163840))
3682 return 320;
3683 if (ST.getFeatureBits().test(FeatureAddressableLocalMemorySize327680))
3684 return 512;
3685 return 64; // In sync with getAddressableLocalMemorySize
3686}
3687
3688bool isPackedFP32Inst(unsigned Opc) {
3689 switch (Opc) {
3690 case AMDGPU::V_PK_ADD_F32:
3691 case AMDGPU::V_PK_ADD_F32_gfx12:
3692 case AMDGPU::V_PK_MUL_F32:
3693 case AMDGPU::V_PK_MUL_F32_gfx12:
3694 case AMDGPU::V_PK_FMA_F32:
3695 case AMDGPU::V_PK_FMA_F32_gfx12:
3696 return true;
3697 default:
3698 return false;
3699 }
3700}
3701
3702const std::array<unsigned, 3> &ClusterDimsAttr::getDims() const {
3703 assert(isFixedDims() && "expect kind to be FixedDims");
3704 return Dims;
3705}
3706
3707std::string ClusterDimsAttr::to_string() const {
3708 SmallString<10> Buffer;
3709 raw_svector_ostream OS(Buffer);
3710
3711 switch (getKind()) {
3712 case Kind::Unknown:
3713 return "";
3714 case Kind::NoCluster: {
3715 OS << EncoNoCluster << ',' << EncoNoCluster << ',' << EncoNoCluster;
3716 return Buffer.c_str();
3717 }
3718 case Kind::VariableDims: {
3719 OS << EncoVariableDims << ',' << EncoVariableDims << ','
3720 << EncoVariableDims;
3721 return Buffer.c_str();
3722 }
3723 case Kind::FixedDims: {
3724 OS << Dims[0] << ',' << Dims[1] << ',' << Dims[2];
3725 return Buffer.c_str();
3726 }
3727 }
3728 llvm_unreachable("Unknown ClusterDimsAttr kind");
3729}
3730
3731ClusterDimsAttr ClusterDimsAttr::get(const Function &F) {
3732 std::optional<SmallVector<unsigned>> Attr =
3733 getIntegerVecAttribute(F, "amdgpu-cluster-dims", /*Size=*/3);
3734 ClusterDimsAttr::Kind AttrKind = Kind::FixedDims;
3735
3736 if (!Attr.has_value())
3737 AttrKind = Kind::Unknown;
3738 else if (all_of(*Attr, [](unsigned V) { return V == EncoNoCluster; }))
3739 AttrKind = Kind::NoCluster;
3740 else if (all_of(*Attr, [](unsigned V) { return V == EncoVariableDims; }))
3741 AttrKind = Kind::VariableDims;
3742
3743 ClusterDimsAttr A(AttrKind);
3744 if (AttrKind == Kind::FixedDims)
3745 A.Dims = {(*Attr)[0], (*Attr)[1], (*Attr)[2]};
3746
3747 return A;
3748}
3749
3750} // namespace AMDGPU
3751
3752raw_ostream &operator<<(raw_ostream &OS,
3753 const AMDGPU::IsaInfo::TargetIDSetting S) {
3754 switch (S) {
3755 case (AMDGPU::IsaInfo::TargetIDSetting::Unsupported):
3756 OS << "Unsupported";
3757 break;
3758 case (AMDGPU::IsaInfo::TargetIDSetting::Any):
3759 OS << "Any";
3760 break;
3761 case (AMDGPU::IsaInfo::TargetIDSetting::Off):
3762 OS << "Off";
3763 break;
3764 case (AMDGPU::IsaInfo::TargetIDSetting::On):
3765 OS << "On";
3766 break;
3767 }
3768 return OS;
3769}
3770
3771} // namespace llvm
